measurement_note: Size is N, the number of Stocks rows. Every stock has one buy and one sell, so K = N / 2 and every group must be emitted. The 16/64/256-row tiers span 16x. Conditional hash aggregation processes all rows in O(N) expected time; a correct correlated query that rescans Stocks for each distinct name performs O(KN) work and completes normally.
